use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons for forms and dialogs with multiple visual variants
Destructive action buttons for delete or warning operations
Ghost and outline buttons for secondary actions in toolbars or cards
Icon-only buttons for compact UI elements like toolbars or navigation
Link-styled buttons for inline navigation within text content
ai_summary: A versatile Button component built on Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority for flexible styling. Supports 6 variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 sizes (default, sm, lg, icon) with standard accessibility features like focus-visible rings and disabled states. Industry-agnostic atomic component suitable for any UI requiring interactive buttons.
